title: litsea wallichii
intro: Litsea wallichii, also known as Indian mayaw or Himalayan mayaw, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is a small, evergreen tree or shrub native to the Himalayas and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. Litsea wallichii has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, and is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
